framing: Supply chain manager laid off from Shopee (tech layoffs) applying to Unilever logistics role in Singapore

jd.title: Supply Chain Planning Manager — Southeast Asia

requirements.text: 7+ years of supply chain planning experience in FMCG, retail, or manufacturing
Experience with demand planning and S&OP (Sales & Operations Planning) processes
Proficiency in SAP APO/IBP or equivalent supply chain planning software
Experience managing supply chains across multiple Southeast Asian markets
Strong analytical skills with experience in demand forecasting models
Experience with warehouse management systems (WMS) and 3PL management
Experience with supply chain sustainability initiatives
Degree in Supply Chain Management, Industrial Engineering, or related field
Experience managing teams of 5+ across planning and logistics functions

responsibilities: Lead demand and supply planning for Unilever's home care and personal care categories across 6 SEA markets
Drive monthly S&OP process with commercial, finance, and manufacturing stakeholders
Manage relationships with 8 third-party logistics providers across the region
Implement demand sensing and forecast accuracy improvement initiatives
Lead team of 7 supply chain planners and analysts
Deliver service level targets (98.5% case fill rate) while optimizing inventory days

expected_output.summary: Supply chain professional with 8 years of experience across e-commerce logistics and FMCG distribution in Southeast Asia. Most recently Supply Chain Lead at Shopee (Sea Group), managing last-mile logistics across 4 SEA markets before role was eliminated in October 2025 regional reorganisation. Previously at Procter & Gamble in supply planning roles. Experience with demand forecasting, S&OP, 3PL management, and warehouse operations. APICS CPIM certified.

experience.title: Supply Chain Lead — Southeast Asia
bullets: Managed end-to-end logistics operations across 4 SEA markets (Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines) serving 2M+ daily orders
Led team of 6 logistics analysts optimizing last-mile delivery routes, reducing average delivery time from 3.2 to 2.1 days
Managed relationships with 12 third-party logistics providers, negotiating annual contracts worth USD 45M
Built demand forecasting models for peak events (9.9, 11.11, 12.12 sales) achieving 85% forecast accuracy at SKU level
Transitioned out when role was eliminated in regional operations reorganisation (October 2025) consolidating supply chain functions under central logistics team

experience.title: Supply Chain Planner
bullets: Managed demand and supply planning for P&G's fabric care category across Singapore and Malaysia
Participated in monthly S&OP process, collaborating with sales, marketing, and manufacturing teams
Achieved 97.5% case fill rate while reducing inventory days from 42 to 35 through improved forecast accuracy
Used SAP APO for demand planning and supply network planning across 3 manufacturing sites

certifications: APICS CPIM (Certified in Planning and Inventory Management)
education: BSc Industrial & Systems Engineering — National University of Singapore (2013-2017)

jd_requirements: 7+ years supply chain planning FMCG retail manufacturing
demand planning S&OP Sales Operations Planning
SAP APO IBP supply chain planning software
supply chains multiple Southeast Asian markets
degree Supply Chain Management Industrial Engineering
deliberate_flaws: E-commerce logistics background, not traditional FMCG supply chain (Unilever wants FMCG experience, Shopee is e-commerce)
No SAP IBP experience (only APO, which is being phased out by SAP)
No WMS hands-on experience (managed 3PLs who ran warehouses, didn't operate WMS directly)
CPIM certified but not CSCP (JD lists CSCP as preferred)
No sustainability experience — JD mentions sustainability initiatives
Role eliminated in reorganisation (not mass layoff) — may still trigger hiring manager bias
P&G experience covers only 2 markets (Singapore, Malaysia) vs JD's 6-market scope

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
